class.name: CollisionPresets3D
class.brief_description: Helper class for working with 3D collision presets.
class.description: Collision presets provide an abstraction over collision masks and layers that allow masks and layers to be synchronized between objects, as well as other functionality. Presets are generally referenced via an internal [int] ID, with the special values [code]0[/code] and [code]-1[/code] used to represent the [b]default[/b] and [b]custom[/b] presets respectively. [b]Note: [/b] This class does not expose methods to set the values of collision presets; this is not generally recommended, especially at runtime as objects only read collision presets when created. However, if you really need to, you can modify the [code]physics/3d/presets[/code] setting. This setting contains an array of dictionaries, each of which have the properties: [code]id[/code] : [int], [code]name[/code] : [String], [code]layer[/code] : [int], and [code]mask[/code] : [int]. See also: [constant PROPERTY_HINT_PRESETS_3D_PHYSICS].

method.name: get_preset
method.description: Gets the ID of the collision preset with the given name.

method.name: get_preset_is_custom
method.description: Gets whether a collision preset with the given ID is considered [b]custom[/b]. This usually means that the preset is [code]-1[/code], however it can also be true if the preset is [b]default[/b], and the default 3D preset is [b]none[/b].

method.name: get_preset_layer
method.description: Gets the collision layer associated with the given preset ID.

method.name: get_preset_mask
method.description: Gets the collision mask associated with the given preset ID.

method.name: get_preset_name
method.description: Gets the name associated with the given preset ID.

method.name: has_preset
method.description: Checks whether a preset with the given ID exists.

method.name: has_preset_named
method.description: Checks whether a preset with the given name exists.
